# JobDex

> Open-source global index of startup hiring by city. Aggregates job listings from Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, and YCombinator ATS providers and plots them on an interactive world map. No login required.

## Pages

- [Home](https://jobdex.1mindlabs.org/): Landing page with project overview and globe visualization
- [Map](https://jobdex.1mindlabs.org/map): Interactive world map with city and company-level job pins, search, and role/remote filters

## API

- [API Reference](https://jobdex-api.1mindlabs.org/docs): REST API for jobs, companies, cities, map pins, and platform stats. Fully public, no authentication required.

## Optional

- [GitHub](https://github.com/areebahmeddd/jobdex): Source code, issue tracker, and contribution guide (MIT license)
